name: French Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, mix salt and pepper.
2. Add the mustard and oil; stir well to combine.
3. Gradually add vinegar while continuously stirring with a fork until thoroughly mixed.
4. Serve immediately once the mixture is fully combined.
Note: Many recipes in this collection lacked specific measurements or oven temperatures. The instructions have been provided as they appear in the original text, including any typos.
